## TRM1.1. Terminal and airport ANS ATFM arrival delay per flight (KPI#2)

Average ATFM arrival delay in Spain was 0.93 min/arr in 2025, the first year of RP4. The **performance has improved compared to 2024**, last year of RP3, when there were 1.10 min/arr.

Palma de Mallorca suffered the highest ATFM arrival delay with 1.97 min/arr, which was nevertheless a small improvement from 2.07 min/arr in 2024. The main reasons behind are weather regulations, combined with ATC Capacity shortages during high demand season (May to October).

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of ATFM Arrival delay across Member States in 2025 was 0.97 min/arr.
